TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Saisiyat, story: SaiNr-pear3_kalaeh a taro_
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: 'aehae' ka baki' 'ima hangaw kaSna'itol ray kaehoey babaw 'ima rokrok ka boway.
S.PHON: ʔæhæʔ ka βakiʔ ʔima haŋaw kaʃnaʔitol raj kæhœj βaβaw ʔima rokrok ka βowaj.
S.FORM: 'aehae' ka baki' 'ima hangaw kaSna'itol ray kaehoey babaw 'ima rokrok ka boway.
S.PHON: ʔæhæʔ ka βakiʔ ʔima haŋaw kaʃnaʔitol raj kæhœj βaβaw ʔima rokrok ka βowaj.
S.TRANSL: 有一位爺爺正架著階梯準備爬上樹去摘水果.
An old man climbed a ladder up a tree to pick fruits.

S.FORM: taboeen ray 'obos kaSrai' 'askanen ray kala'.
S.PHON: taβœən raj ʔoβos~θ kaʃraiʔ ʔas~θkanən raj kalaʔ.
S.FORM: taboeen ray 'obos kaSrai' 'askanen ray kala'.
S.PHON: taβœən raj ʔoβos~θ kaʃraiʔ ʔas~θkanən raj kalaʔ.

TRANSL.notes: 他放(水果)到袋子, 下來, 放進籃子裡.

S.TRANSL: 他放 到袋子, 下來, 放進籃子裡.

TRANSL.notes: He put (the fruits) in (his) bag, came down and placed (them) in the basket.

S.TRANSL: He put in bag, came down and placed in the basket.

S.FORM: 'aehae' mariin boway tiisin noka hahako'.
S.PHON: ʔæhæʔ mariin βowaj tiis~θin noka hahakoʔ.
S.FORM: 'aehae' mariin boway tiisin noka hahako'.
S.PHON: ʔæhæʔ mariin βowaj tiis~θin noka hahakoʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他拿一個水果, 用包巾擦一擦.
He took one fruit and wiped it with a handkerchief.

S.FORM: insa'an kaSna'itol ray kaehoey babaw naehaen.
S.PHON: ins~θaʔan kaʃnaʔitol raj kæhœj βaβaw næhæn.
S.FORM: insa'an kaSna'itol ray kaehoey babaw naehaen.
S.PHON: ins~θaʔan kaʃnaʔitol raj kæhœj βaβaw næhæn.

TRANSL.notes: (老人)又再爬上樹.

S.TRANSL: 又再爬上樹.

TRANSL.notes: (The old man) went up the tree again.

S.TRANSL: went up the tree again.

S.FORM: mwai' 'aehae' ka mae'iyaeh 'ima hoehoe' ka Siri' may hiza ilahiza kabih.
S.PHON: mwaiʔ ʔæhæʔ ka mæʔijæh ʔima hœhœʔ ka ʃiriʔ maj hiz~ða ilahiz~ða kaβih.
S.FORM: mwai' 'aehae' ka mae'iyaeh 'ima hoehoe' ka Siri' may hiza ilahiza kabih.
S.PHON: mwaiʔ ʔæhæʔ ka mæʔijæh ʔima hœhœʔ ka ʃiriʔ maj hiz~ða ilahiz~ða kaβih.
S.TRANSL: 拉著羊的男人經過那裡往那個方向去.
A man pulling a goat passed by there and went that way.

S.FORM: mwai' ka korkoring 'ima papama' ray kapapama'an mwai' ilahiza ray eh tatini' 'aehae' 'am rokrok ka boway.
S.PHON: mwaiʔ ka korkoriŋ ʔima papamaʔ raj kapapamaʔan mwaiʔ ilahiz~ða raj əh tatiniʔ ʔæhæʔ ʔam rokrok ka βowaj.
S.FORM: mwai' ka korkoring 'ima papama' ray kapapama'an mwai' ilahiza ray eh tatini' 'aehae' 'am rokrok ka boway.
S.PHON: mwaiʔ ka korkoriŋ ʔima papamaʔ raj kapapamaʔan mwaiʔ ilahiz~ða raj əh tatiniʔ ʔæhæʔ ʔam rokrok ka βowaj.
S.TRANSL: 一個男孩騎著腳踏車來到老人摘水果的地方. 啊, 老人正在摘水果.
A boy came riding a bike and came to where the old man was picking fruits. Aah... An old man was picking fruits.

S.FORM: sisil ma pakalben ka kapapama'an sisil ka boway mariin 'in'alay rai' kapapama'an sikraiw ila.
S.PHON: s~θis~θil ma pakalβən ka kapapamaʔan s~θis~θil ka βowaj mariin ʔinʔalaj raiʔ kapapamaʔan s~θikraiw ila.
S.FORM: sisil ma pakalben ka kapapama'an sisil ka boway mariin 'in'alay rai' kapapama'an sikraiw ila.
S.PHON: s~θis~θil ma pakalβən ka kapapamaʔan s~θis~θil ka βowaj mariin ʔinʔalaj raiʔ kapapamaʔan s~θikraiw ila.

TRANSL.notes: (男孩)放倒他的腳踏車, 提起一籃水果, 放到他的腳踏車, 然後離開.

S.TRANSL: 放倒他的腳踏車, 提起一籃水果, 放到他的腳踏車, 然後離開.

TRANSL.notes: (The boy) lay down his bike, lifted (the basket of) fruits, put (them) on his bike and left the old man.

S.TRANSL: lay down his bike, lifted fruits, put on his bike and left the old man.

S.FORM: raiw ila sia ray raan sasbong ka 'aehae' mae'iyaeh.
S.PHON: raiw ila s~θia raj raan s~θas~θβoŋ ka ʔæhæʔ mæʔijæh.
S.FORM: raiw ila sia ray raan sasbong ka 'aehae' mae'iyaeh.
S.PHON: raiw ila s~θia raj raan s~θas~θβoŋ ka ʔæhæʔ mæʔijæh.
S.TRANSL: 他離開, 在路上遇見另一個男孩.
He left, and then met somebody along the way.

S.FORM: sia roSa' sasbong.
S.PHON: s~θia roʃaʔ s~θas~θβoŋ.
S.FORM: sia roSa' sasbong.
S.PHON: s~θia roʃaʔ s~θas~θβoŋ.

TRANSL.notes: 他們兩個(在路上)相遇.

S.TRANSL: 他們兩個 相遇.

TRANSL.notes: Both of them met (along the way).

S.TRANSL: Both of them met .

S.FORM: tono' ka bato' malben.
S.PHON: tonoʔ ka βatoʔ malβən.
S.FORM: tono' ka bato' malben.
S.PHON: tonoʔ ka βatoʔ malβən.

TRANSL.notes: (她的腳踏車)撞到石頭, (他就)跌倒.

S.TRANSL: 撞到石頭, 跌倒.

TRANSL.notes: (His bike) hit a stone and (he) fell down.

S.TRANSL: hit a stone and fell down.

S.FORM: sisaah ka boway.
S.PHON: s~θis~θaah ka βowaj.
S.FORM: sisaah ka boway.
S.PHON: s~θis~θaah ka βowaj.

TRANSL.notes: 水果散落(了滿地).

S.TRANSL: 水果散落 .

TRANSL.notes: The fruits spilled (all over the place).

S.TRANSL: The fruits spilled .

S.FORM: mwai' too' mae'iyaeh korkoring tatilhaehael rokrok ka boway boway mariin papayhae'hae'en ray kala'.
S.PHON: mwaiʔ tooʔ mæʔijæh korkoriŋ tatilhæhæl rokrok ka βowaj βowaj mariin papajhæʔhæʔən raj kalaʔ.
S.FORM: mwai' too' mae'iyaeh korkoring tatilhaehael rokrok ka boway boway mariin papayhae'hae'en ray kala'.
S.PHON: mwaiʔ tooʔ mæʔijæh korkoriŋ tatilhæhæl rokrok ka βowaj βowaj mariin papajhæʔhæʔən raj kalaʔ.

TRANSL.notes: 三個小孩過來幫忙(男孩)撿水果, 把它們放到籃子裡.

S.TRANSL: 三個小孩過來幫忙 撿水果, 把它們放到籃子裡.

TRANSL.notes: Three children came and helped (the boy) pick the fruits up and put them (back) in the basket.

S.TRANSL: Three children came and helped pick the fruits up and put them in the basket.

S.FORM: 'in'alay ray kapapama'an 'arasen pama'en ila rima' ziza.
S.PHON: ʔinʔalaj raj kapapamaʔan ʔaras~θən pamaʔən ila rimaʔ z~ðiz~ða.
S.FORM: 'in'alay ray kapapama'an 'arasen pama'en ila rima' ziza.
S.PHON: ʔinʔalaj raj kapapamaʔan ʔaras~θən pamaʔən ila rimaʔ z~ðiz~ða.

TRANSL.notes: (男孩)提起(籃子)放回他的腳踏車, 然後騎走了.

S.TRANSL: 提起 放回他的腳踏車, 然後騎走了.

TRANSL.notes: (The boy) lifted (the basket) back to (his) bike and rode away taking (with him the basket).

S.TRANSL: lifted back to bike and rode away taking .

S.FORM: eh rawaS ila sowiti' 'ima tatilhaehael too' mae'iyaeh korkoring sanabih hiyop koSa niSo ka tatpo' singowip.
S.PHON: əh rawaʃ ila s~θowitiʔ ʔima tatilhæhæl tooʔ mæʔijæh korkoriŋ s~θanaβih hijop koʃa niʃo ka tatpoʔ s~θiŋowip.
S.FORM: eh rawaS ila sowiti' 'ima tatilhaehael too' mae'iyaeh korkoring sanabih hiyop koSa niSo ka tatpo' singowip.
S.PHON: əh rawaʃ ila s~θowitiʔ ʔima tatilhæhæl tooʔ mæʔijæh korkoriŋ s~θanaβih hijop koʃa niʃo ka tatpoʔ s~θiŋowip.

TRANSL.notes: 當男孩走遠了一些, 三個男孩幫忙(撿起他的帽子), 回頭對著他吹(口哨), 說, 你忘了這帽子.

S.TRANSL: 當男孩走遠了一些, 三個男孩幫忙 , 回頭對著他吹 , 說, 你忘了這帽子.

TRANSL.notes: When the boy have gone a bit far, the three children helped (him pick his hat up), turned back and whistled at him saying, "you forgot this hat".

S.TRANSL: When the boy have gone a bit far, the three children helped , turned back and whistled at him saying, "you forgot this hat".

S.FORM: lobih hibih 'ae'aeaew rima' minobih.
S.PHON: loβih hiβih ʔæʔææw rimaʔ minoβih.
S.FORM: lobih hibih 'ae'aeaew rima' minobih.
S.PHON: loβih hiβih ʔæʔææw rimaʔ minoβih.

TRANSL.notes: (男孩)轉回頭, (其中一個小孩)跑過去(把他的帽子)還給他.

S.TRANSL: 轉回頭, 跑過去 還給他.

TRANSL.notes: (The boy) turned back and (one of the children) ran and returned (his hat).

S.TRANSL: turned back and ran and returned .

S.FORM: insa'an beayen ka lapowar too' ba sibeay hilasia.
S.PHON: ins~θaʔan βəajən ka lapowar tooʔ βa s~θiβəaj hilas~θia.
S.FORM: insa'an beayen ka lapowar too' ba sibeay hilasia.
S.PHON: ins~θaʔan βəajən ka lapowar tooʔ βa s~θiβəaj hilas~θia.

TRANSL.notes: 現在(他)拿了三個芭樂給他們.

S.TRANSL: 現在 拿了三個芭樂給他們.

TRANSL.notes: Now (he took) three guavas (and) gave to them.

S.TRANSL: Now three guavas gave to them.

S.FORM: 'am papnae'hae' 'aehae' 'apolon.
S.PHON: ʔam papnæʔhæʔ ʔæhæʔ ʔapolon.
S.FORM: 'am papnae'hae' 'aehae' 'apolon.
S.PHON: ʔam papnæʔhæʔ ʔæhæʔ ʔapolon.
S.TRANSL: 每個小孩都給一個芭樂.

TRANSL.notes: To distribute to wach (of them).

S.TRANSL: To distribute to wach .

S.FORM: isaza tatini' rima' rokrok naehaen babaw ka boway.
S.PHON: is~θaz~ða tatiniʔ rimaʔ rokrok næhæn βaβaw ka βowaj.
S.FORM: isaza tatini' rima' rokrok naehaen babaw ka boway.
S.PHON: is~θaz~ða tatiniʔ rimaʔ rokrok næhæn βaβaw ka βowaj.
S.TRANSL: 老人還在樹上摘水果.
The old man was still up in the tree to pick fruits.

S.FORM: kasrai' mwai' kiim.
S.PHON: kas~θraiʔ mwaiʔ kiim.
S.FORM: kasrai' mwai' kiim.
S.PHON: kas~θraiʔ mwaiʔ kiim.

TRANSL.notes: (他)爬下來找(籃子).

S.TRANSL: 爬下來找 .

TRANSL.notes: (He) climbed down and looked for (the basket).

S.TRANSL: climbed down and looked for .

S.FORM: Sa hini boway 'ima hayno' ay ila.
S.PHON: ʃa hini βowaj ʔima hajnoʔ aj ila.
S.FORM: Sa hini boway 'ima hayno' ay ila.
S.PHON: ʃa hini βowaj ʔima hajnoʔ aj ila.
S.TRANSL: 水果哪裡去了.
Where have the fruits here gone?

S.FORM: sakosizaen kitaen korkoring may isaza too' sahpiih ilahiza ila kabih naehaen manraan.
S.PHON: s~θakos~θiz~ðæn kitæn korkoriŋ maj is~θaz~ða tooʔ s~θahpiih ilahiz~ða ila kaβih næhæn manraan.
S.FORM: sakosizaen kitaen korkoring may isaza too' sahpiih ilahiza ila kabih naehaen manraan.
S.PHON: s~θakos~θiz~ðæn kitæn korkoriŋ maj is~θaz~ða tooʔ s~θahpiih ilahiz~ða ila kaβih næhæn manraan.

TRANSL.notes: (他)看到三個小孩經過, 往那個方向走下去.

S.TRANSL: 看到三個小孩經過, 往那個方向走下去.

TRANSL.notes: (He) saw three children pass by and walk toward that direction.

S.TRANSL: saw three children pass by and walk toward that direction.

S.FORM: oh.
S.PHON: oh.
S.FORM: oh.
S.PHON: oh.
S.TRANSL: DM
DM
